description.en: Return the Gamma function at x. Added in version 3.2.

excerpt.es: Return the Gamma function at x. Added in version 3.2.
excerpt.en: Return the Gamma function at x. Added in version 3.2.

description.en: Return the greatest common divisor of the specified integer arguments. If any of the arguments is nonzero, then the returned value is the largest positive integer that is a divisor of all arguments. If all arguments are zero, then the returned value is 0. gcd() without arguments returns 0. Added in version 3.5. Changed in version 3.9: Added support for an arbitrary number of arguments. Formerly, only two arguments were supported.
